name: codex-habit-hub
description: HUB manifest — Codex Habitat as central orchestrator for skill clusters

query.description: Skills ask: what does the user prefer?
query.response_format: plain text with key: value pairs

context.description: Current user state (project, task, active order_of_worth)
context.includes: current order_of_worth, active patterns, signal volume

feedback.description: Skills contribute signals back to the hub

priority.description: When multiple skills conflict, hub decides based on user profile
priority.strategy: Match skill recommendation to user's current order_of_worth

events.user_preference_detected: A new user preference signal was captured
events.order_of_worth_shift: User's active value order changed (e.g., industrial → inspirational)
events.test_encountered: A preference was tested and confirmed/corrected

compatible_skills: any skill with npx skills add format
